title: DEBUG SQL statement broken
description:
SQL debugging history not reset.

**To Reproduce**
create table empty(i int, s string);
debug select * from empty;
l[0]

This will show a proper plan with emptybinds.
Now, execute:

insert into empty values(1,'hello');
debug select * from empty;
l[0]

The MAL listing is the one from the previous call.
It contains emptybinds, which it shouldn't


**Software versions**
 - MonetDB version number Default
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), value FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT * FROM test_table WHERE value IS NULL;
key_bug_features: SQL debugging history not reset after insert operation
